mechanism_narrative: Sustained high unemployment indicates weak economic conditions, leading to lower corporate earnings expectations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:High unemployment typically correlates with recessions and reduced consumer spending.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60% of periods where UNRATE is above its 12-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: A significant rebound in retail sales from a low base suggests improving consumer confidence and spending, which boosts corporate revenues and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth rate turns positive after 6 consecutive months of decline.
evidence_refs: fact:Consumer spending is a major component of GDP and economic recovery.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative or flat in more than 50% of instances where the RSAFS trigger condition is met.

mechanism_narrative: When the Federal Funds Rate is low and inflation (CPIAUCSL) is stable or declining, it signals an accommodative monetary environment that supports equity valuations by lowering the cost of capital and increasing liquidity, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Low interest rates generally support higher equity valuations.
regime_hint: low interest rate, low inflation environment
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in more than 40% of periods where both FEDFUNDS is low and CPIAUCSL growth is contained.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of economic contraction, a stabilization or slight increase in industrial production indicates that the worst of the downturn is over, signaling a potential bottoming for corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 1-month change > 0 after 3 consecutive months of decline.
evidence_refs: fact:Industrial production is a key coincident indicator of economic activity.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns remain negative or flat in more than 50% of instances where INDPRO shows signs of stabilization during a contraction.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in non-farm payrolls indicates a strengthening labor market, which translates to higher consumer income and spending, ultimately boosting corporate profits and S&P 500 forward returns over a 5-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Job growth is a strong indicator of economic health and consumer demand.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in more than 55% of periods following a strong PAYEMS report.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent weakness in housing starts reflects a lack of confidence in the economic outlook and future demand, leading to reduced investment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Housing is a cyclically sensitive sector, impacting broader economic activity.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 60% of periods where HOUST is below its 12-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: When the Federal Funds Rate is at its effective lower bound (near zero), it signals extreme monetary accommodation, which, in a crisis or post-crisis environment, aims to stimulate the economy and support asset prices, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Central banks cut rates to stimulate the economy during downturns.
regime_hint: financial crisis or severe recession recovery
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative or flat in more than 50% of instances when FEDFUNDS is at the lower bound during a crisis.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates a broad-based economic contraction affecting both demand and supply sides, which severely impacts corporate earnings and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter annualized growth < 0 AND INDPRO 3-month change < 0.
evidence_refs: fact:Recessions are characterized by declines in both GDP and industrial output.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 30% of periods where both GDPC1 and INDPRO are contracting.
